title: Got `writing blob: uploading layer chunked: StatusCode: 400` error during `skopeo copy`
body:
I tried to copy the images between image registries but I got the following error message on my GHA runner: ```bash time="2025-10-10T06:04:43Z" level=fatal msg="writing blob: uploading layer chunked: StatusCode: 400, \"

400 Bad request

\\nYour browser ...\"" ``` Already tried to solve the issue by specify the format with `--dest-compress-format "zsdt"` or `--dest-compress-format "gzip"` but it didn't work. Any advice to get more information for debugging or recommand resolution?

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

A bit more information is provided with `--log-level=debug`, but at a first glance this _very strongly_ suggests that the destination is not serving the registry protocol. Either there isn’t a container registry at all, or there is a typo somewhere (in the host name, in the deployment config); or maybe a proxy on the way is interfering with HTTP requests.

This might be an error caused by the complex environment in production, possibly because there's some section we didn't notice - a unique ACL that skopeo specifically requires but was overlooked (maybe). Due to time pressure, we ultimately didn't attempt to solve this issue in depth, but instead added an additional layer of JFROG as an intermediate image registry to resolve this problem. ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant GHA as GHA Runner (Enterprise) participant Harbor as Internal Harbor participant JFrog as Public JFrog Registry participant Jump as JumpProxy participant Bastion as Bastion Host participant OCP as OCP Image Stream Note over GHA, OCP: Container Image Transfer Flow with Skopeo GHA->>JFrog: 1. skopeo copy from Harbor to JFrog Note right of GHA: skopeo copy docker://harbor/image:tag
docker://jfrog/image:tag Harbor-->>JFrog: Direct image transfer JFrog-->>GHA: Transfer confirmation GHA->>Jump: 2. SSH connection request Jump->>Bastion: 3. Establish SSH tunnel Bastion-->>Jump: SSH connection established Jump-->>GHA: Connection ready Note over GHA, Bastion: SSH session active via JumpProxy GHA->>Bastion: 4. Execute skopeo copy via SSH Note right of Bastion: skopeo copy docker://jfrog/image:tag
docker://ocp-registry/namespace/imagestream:tag Bastion->>JFrog: 5. Source image access JFrog-->>Bastion: Image layers transfer Bastion->>OCP: 6. Direct transfer to Image Stream OCP-->>Bastion: Transfer confirmation Bastion-->>GHA: Deployment completed ```
